---
title: "Arkusz 13 — rozwiązania"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

**Zad. 1.**

```{r}
nei <- readRDS("data/summarySCC_PM25.rds")
scc <- readRDS("data/Source_Classification_Code.rds")
dim(nei)   # 6497651 × 6
dim(scc)   # 11717 × 15
names(nei)
names(scc)
sort(unique(nei$year))   # 1999 2002 2005 2008
levels(factor(nei$type)) # NON-ROAD NONPOINT ON-ROAD POINT
```

**Odp.: 4 lata (1999/2002/2005/2008), 4 typy.**

**Zad. 2.**

```{r}
library(dplyr)
nei %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Emissions, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(year)
```

**Odp.: Trend wyraźnie malejący: 7,33 mln (1999) → 5,85 mln (2002) → 5,54 mln (2005) → 3,46 mln (2008).**

**Zad. 3.**

```{r}
t99 <- sum(nei$Emissions[nei$year == 1999], na.rm = TRUE)   # 7 332 967
t08 <- sum(nei$Emissions[nei$year == 2008], na.rm = TRUE)   # 3 464 206
cat("1999:", t99, "\n2008:", t08, "\nspadek:", round((1 - t08/t99)*100, 1), "%\n")
```

**Odp.: spadek o ~52,7%.**

**Zad. 4.**

```{r}
nei %>%
  filter(fips == "24510") %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Emissions, na.rm = TRUE))
```

**Odp.: Baltimore: 3274 → 2454 → 3091 → 1862. Ogólny trend spadkowy, choć 2005 był wyższy niż 2002.**

**Zad. 5.**

```{r}
nei %>%
  filter(fips == "24510") %>%
  group_by(year, type) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Emissions, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(year, desc(total))
```

**Odp.: W 1999 dominuje NONPOINT (2107), w 2008 spada do 1509. ON-ROAD spada z 347 do 88.**

**Zad. 6.**

```{r}
coal_scc <- scc %>%
  filter(grepl("Combustion", SCC.Level.One, ignore.case = TRUE),
         grepl("Coal",       SCC.Level.Four, ignore.case = TRUE))
nrow(coal_scc)   # 62

nei %>%
  filter(SCC %in% coal_scc$SCC) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Emissions, na.rm = TRUE))
```

**Odp.: 62 kody SCC. Emisje ze spalania węgla: 551 535 (1999) → 474 709 → 481 834 → 332 024 (2008) — malejące.**

**Zad. 7.**

```{r}
nei %>%
  filter(fips == "24510", type == "ON-ROAD") %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Emissions, na.rm = TRUE))
```

**Odp.: 347 → 134 → 130 → 88 — silny spadek emisji z ruchu drogowego w Baltimore.**

**Zad. 8.**

```{r}
nei %>%
  inner_join(scc %>% select(SCC, EI.Sector), by = "SCC") %>%
  group_by(EI.Sector) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Emissions, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  slice(1:5)
```

**Odp.: Top sektory: Dust - Unpaved Road Dust (~3,8M), Dust - Paved Road Dust (~2,1M), ...**

**Zad. 9.**

```{r}
nei %>%
  filter(type == "ON-ROAD", fips %in% c("24510", "06037")) %>%
  group_by(fips, year) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Emissions, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = fips, values_from = total,
                     names_prefix = "fips_")
```

**Odp.: Los Angeles (06037) ma znacznie wyższe emisje ON-ROAD w każdym roku. W 2008: LA ~4571, Baltimore ~88.**

**Zad. 10.**

```{r}
brakujace <- nei %>%
  anti_join(scc, by = "SCC")
nrow(brakujace)
```

**Odp.: liczba obserwacji w NEI bez odpowiednika w SCC (jeśli > 0 — brud danych).**

**Zad. 11.** → **`x <- readRDS("plik.rds")`** — readRDS zwraca obiekt, trzeba go przypisać.

**Zad. 12.** → **wiersze A, które nie mają odpowiednika w B** (`anti_join`).

**Zad. 13.** → **pojawia się w środowisku pod własną nazwą automatycznie** (`load()` nie zwraca wartości do przypisania).

**Zad. 14.**

```{r}
nei %>%
  inner_join(scc %>% select(SCC, EI.Sector), by = "SCC") %>%
  filter(year %in% c(1999, 2008)) %>%
  group_by(EI.Sector, year) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Emissions, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = year, values_from = total,
                     names_prefix = "y") %>%
  mutate(ratio_2008_1999 = y2008 / y1999) %>%
  arrange(ratio_2008_1999) %>%
  slice(1:5)
```

**Odp.: Sektory z największym spadkiem to te z ratio bliskim 0 (np. ON-ROAD categories).**
